story_prompt: create a lecture how project managemnt works

scenes.text: Introduction to Project Management: Overview, scope, and significance.
scenes.image_prompt:
mindmap
  root((Project Management))
    Definition
    Scope
    Importance

scenes.text: Initiation Phase: Setting objectives, identifying key stakeholders, and outlining scope.
scenes.image_prompt:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B[Identify Objectives]
  B --> C[Identify Stakeholders]
  C --> D[Outline Scope]
  D --> E[End]

scenes.text: Planning Phase: Developing schedule, resources, and risk management strategies.
scenes.image_prompt:
gantt
  title Planning Schedule
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  section Planning Tasks
  Schedule :a1, 2024-02-01, 20d
  Resources :a2, after a1, 15d
  Risk Management :a3, after a2, 10d

scenes.text: Execution Phase: Implementing the project plan, team management, and communication.
scenes.image_prompt:
sequenceDiagram
  participant ProjectManager
  participant Team
  ProjectManager->>Team: Assign Tasks
  Team-->>ProjectManager: Provide Updates

scenes.text: Monitoring and Controlling Phase: Tracking project progress and making necessary adjustments.
scenes.image_prompt:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Planning
  Planning --> Execution
  Execution --> Monitoring
  Monitoring --> Controlling
  Controlling --> [*]

scenes.text: Closure Phase: Completing tasks, obtaining acceptance, and formally closing the project.
scenes.image_prompt:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B[Complete Tasks]
  B --> C[Obtain Acceptance]
  C --> D[Formal Closure]
  D --> E[End]

scenes.text: Project Lifecycle: Understanding the stages from conception to completion.
scenes.image_prompt:
mindmap
  root((Project Lifecycle))
    Initiation
    Planning
    Execution
    Monitoring
    Closure

scenes.text: Role of Project Manager: Responsibilities, skills required, and leadership.
scenes.image_prompt:
mindmap
  root((Project Manager))
    Responsibilities
    Skills
    Leadership

scenes.text: Risk Management: Identifying, analyzing, and responding to project risks.
scenes.image_prompt:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B[Identify Risks]
  B --> C[Analyze Risks]
  C --> D[Respond to Risks]
  D --> E[End]

scenes.text: Tools and Techniques: Overview of methodologies like Agile, Waterfall, and tools like Gantt Charts.
scenes.image_prompt:
mindmap
  root((Tools and Techniques))
    Methodologies
      Agile
      Waterfall
    Tools
      Gantt Charts
      Kanban
